verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For many years He called my name, Told me all I had to gain, But each time He gave the call, I just looked away; But then He turned my eyes around, He set my feet on higher ground, From Satan's power, that very hour, I looked away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Look away to Jesus, look away, There's a beauty of Jesus Christ on display; Just fix your eyes upon the Word of Life today, From fear and dread just turn your head, And look away.

verse.name: v3
